Accepts ISO 639-1 codes (`zh`, `ja`, `ko`, `en`, `es`, `fr`, `de`, etc.) or friendly names (`chinese`, `japanese`, `korean`, `english`, `spanish`, etc.). Throughout execution, report progress to the user at each phase transition and during batch processing. This keeps users informed on large codebases where analysis can take a long time.

- **Phase completion:** When a phase finishes, briefly confirm:

Worktrees managed by Claude Code are ephemeral — `.understand-anything/` written there is destroyed when the session ends, taking the knowledge graph with it (issue #133). Detect a worktree by comparing `git rev-parse --git-dir` against `git rev-parse --git-common-dir`; in a normal checkout or submodule they resolve to the same path, in a worktree they differ and the parent of `--git-common-dir` is the main repo root.

     ```bash
     COMMON_DIR=$(git -C "$PROJECT_ROOT" rev-parse --git-common-dir 2>/dev/null)
     GIT_DIR=$(git -C "$PROJECT_ROOT" rev-parse --git-dir 2>/dev/null)
     if [ -n "$COMMON_DIR" ] && [ -n "$GIT_DIR" ]; then
       COMMON_ABS=$(cd "$PROJECT_ROOT" && cd "$COMMON_DIR" 2>/dev/null && pwd -P)
       GIT_ABS=$(cd "$PROJECT_ROOT" && cd "$GIT_DIR" 2>/dev/null && pwd -P)
       if [ -n "$COMMON_ABS" ] && [ "$COMMON_ABS" != "$GIT_ABS" ]; then
         MAIN_ROOT=$(dirname "$COMMON_ABS")
         if [ -d "$MAIN_ROOT" ] && [ "${UNDERSTAND_NO_WORKTREE_REDIRECT:-0}" != "1" ]; then
           echo "[understand] Detected git worktree at $PROJECT_ROOT"
           echo "[understand] Redirecting output to main repo root: $MAIN_ROOT"
           echo "[understand] (Set UNDERSTAND_NO_WORKTREE_REDIRECT=1 to keep PROJECT_ROOT as the worktree.)"
           PROJECT_ROOT="$MAIN_ROOT"
         fi
       fi
     fi
     ```

     ```bash
     node -e "
     const fs = require('fs');
     const path = require('path');
     const root = process.cwd();
     const defaults = ['node_modules/','node_modules','.git/','vendor/','venv/','.venv/','__pycache__/','dist/','dist','build/','build','out/','coverage/','coverage','.next/','.cache/','.turbo/','target/','obj/','*.lock','package-lock.json','yarn.lock','pnpm-lock.yaml','*.png','*.jpg','*.jpeg','*.gif','*.svg','*.ico','*.woff','*.woff2','*.ttf','*.eot','*.mp3','*.mp4','*.pdf','*.zip','*.tar','*.gz','*.min.js','*.min.css','*.map','*.generated.*','.idea/','.vscode/','LICENSE','.gitignore','.editorconfig','.prettierrc','.eslintrc*','*.log'];
     const norm = p => p.replace(/\/+$/, '');
     const defaultSet = new Set(defaults.map(norm));
     const header = '# .understandignore — patterns for files/dirs to exclude from analysis\n# Syntax: same as .gitignore (globs, # comments, ! negation, trailing / for dirs)\n# Lines below are suggestions — uncomment to activate.\n# Use ! prefix to force-include something excluded by defaults.\n#\n# Built-in defaults (always excluded unless negated):\n#   node_modules/, .git/, dist/, build/, obj/, *.lock, *.min.js, etc.\n#\n';
     let body = '';
     const gitignorePath = path.join(root, '.gitignore');
     if (fs.existsSync(gitignorePath)) {
       const gi = fs.readFileSync(gitignorePath, 'utf-8').split('\n').map(l => l.trim()).filter(l => l && !l.startsWith('#')).filter(p => !defaultSet.has(norm(p)));
       if (gi.length) { body += '# --- From .gitignore (uncomment to exclude) ---\n\n' + gi.map(p => '# ' + p).join('\n') + '\n\n'; }
     }
     const dirs = ['__tests__','test','tests','fixtures','testdata','docs','examples','scripts','migrations','.storybook'];
     const found = dirs.filter(d => fs.existsSync(path.join(root, d)));
     if (found.length) { body += '# --- Detected directories (uncomment to exclude) ---\n\n' + found.map(d => '# ' + d + '/').join('\n') + '\n\n'; }
     body += '# --- Test file patterns (uncomment to exclude) ---\n\n# *.test.*\n# *.spec.*\n# *.snap\n';
     const outDir = path.join(root, '.understand-anything');
     if (!fs.existsSync(outDir)) fs.mkdirSync(outDir, { recursive: true });
     fs.writeFileSync(path.join(outDir, '.understandignore'), header + body);
     "
     ```

This script reads all `batch-*.json` files (including `batch-<i>-part-<k>.json` produced by file-analyzers that split their output) from `$PROJECT_ROOT/.understand-anything/intermediate/`, then in one pass:
- Combines all nodes and edges across batches
- Normalizes node IDs (strips double prefixes, project-name prefixes, adds missing prefixes)
- Normalizes complexity values (`low`→`simple`, `medium`→`moderate`, `high`→`complex`, etc.)
- Rewrites edge references to match corrected node IDs
- Deduplicates nodes by ID (keeps last occurrence) and edges by `(source, target, type)`
- Drops dangling edges referencing missing nodes
- Logs all corrections and dropped items to stderr

The merge script also runs a `tested_by` linker that canonicalizes test-coverage edges in two passes. **Pass 1** walks LLM-emitted `tested_by` edges and flips inverted ones in place; semantically broken edges (test↔test, prod↔prod, orphan endpoints) are dropped. **Pass 2** supplements with path-convention pairings. Production nodes that end up sourcing any `tested_by` edge get a `"tested"` tag. All resulting edges run `production → test`.

```javascript
    if (!n.id) { issues.push(`Node[${i}] missing id`); return; }
    if (!n.type) issues.push(`Node[${i}] '${n.id}' missing type`);
    if (!n.name) issues.push(`Node[${i}] '${n.id}' missing name`);
    if (!n.summary) issues.push(`Node[${i}] '${n.id}' missing summary`);
    if (!n.tags || !n.tags.length) issues.push(`Node[${i}] '${n.id}' missing tags`);
    if (seen.has(n.id)) issues.push(`Duplicate node ID '${n.id}' at indices ${seen.get(n.id)} and ${i}`);
    else seen.set(n.id, i);
    nodeIds.add(n.id);
  });
  graph.edges.forEach((e, i) => {
    if (!nodeIds.has(e.source)) issues.push(`Edge[${i}] source '${e.source}' not found`);
    if (!nodeIds.has(e.target)) issues.push(`Edge[${i}] target '${e.target}' not found`);
  });
  const fileLevelTypes = new Set(['file', 'config', 'document', 'service', 'pipeline', 'table', 'schema', 'resource', 'endpoint']);
  const fileNodes = graph.nodes.filter(n => fileLevelTypes.has(n.type)).map(n => n.id);
  const assigned = new Map();
  if (!Array.isArray(graph.layers)) { if (graph.layers) warnings.push('graph.layers is not an array'); graph.layers = []; }
  if (!Array.isArray(graph.tour)) { if (graph.tour) warnings.push('graph.tour is not an array'); graph.tour = []; }
  graph.layers.forEach(layer => {
    (layer.nodeIds || []).forEach(id => {
      if (!nodeIds.has(id)) issues.push(`Layer '${layer.id}' refs missing node '${id}'`);
      if (assigned.has(id)) issues.push(`Node '${id}' appears in multiple layers`);
      assigned.set(id, layer.id);
    });
  });
  fileNodes.forEach(id => {
    if (!assigned.has(id)) issues.push(`File node '${id}' not in any layer`);
  });
  graph.tour.forEach((step, i) => {
    (step.nodeIds || []).forEach(id => {
      if (!nodeIds.has(id)) issues.push(`Tour step[${i}] refs missing node '${id}'`);
    });
  });
  const withEdges = new Set([
    ...graph.edges.map(e => e.source),
    ...graph.edges.map(e => e.target)
  ]);
  graph.nodes.forEach(n => {
    if (!withEdges.has(n.id)) warnings.push(`Node '${n.id}' has no edges (orphan)`);
  });
  const stats = {
    totalNodes: graph.nodes.length,
    totalEdges: graph.edges.length,
    totalLayers: graph.layers.length,
    tourSteps: graph.tour.length,
    nodeTypes: graph.nodes.reduce((a, n) => { a[n.type] = (a[n.type]||0)+1; return a; }, {}),
    edgeTypes: graph.edges.reduce((a, e) => { a[e.type] = (a[e.type]||0)+1; return a; }, {})
  };
  fs.writeFileSync(outputPath, JSON.stringify({ issues, warnings, stats }, null, 2));
  process.exit(0);
} catch (err) { process.stderr.write(err.message + '\n'); process.exit(1); }
```

8	
9	# File Analyzer
10	
11	You are an expert code analyst. Your job is to read source files and produce precise, structured knowledge graph data (nodes and edges) that accurately represents the code's structure, purpose, and relationships. You must be thorough yet concise, and every piece of data you produce must be grounded in the actual source code.

13	## Task
14	
15	For each file in the batch provided to you, extract structural data via a script, then apply expert judgment to generate summaries, tags, complexity ratings, and semantic edges. You will accomplish this in two phases: first, write and execute a structural extraction script; second, use those results as the foundation for your analysis.

39	- `sizeLines` (integer) — line count

The corresponding `metrics.serviceCount` / `metrics.endpointCount` / `metrics.resourceCount` / `metrics.stepCount` / `metrics.definitionCount` fields tell you how many were extracted at a glance.

132	**Supported file categories:** The bundled script handles all file categories — `code` (10 languages with tree-sitter: TypeScript, JavaScript, Python, Go, Rust, Java, Ruby, PHP, C/C++, C#), `config`, `docs`, `infra`, `data`, `script`, and `markup`. 136	- **Batch** (`.bat`, `.cmd`): match `:LABEL` lines as call targets
137	- **Swift / Kotlin**: match top-level `func NAME(` / `fun NAME(`

147	For each file in the script's `results` array, produce `GraphNode` and `GraphEdge` objects by combining the script's structural data with your expert judgment.

149	### Step 1 -- Create File Node
150	
151	For every file in the results (and any skipped files that you can still read), create a node. The **node type** depends on the file's category:
152	
153	#### Node type mapping by fileCategory:
154	
155	| fileCategory | Default Node Type | Override Conditions |
156	|---|---|---|
157	| `code` | `file` | Standard code file |
158	| `config` | `config` | Configuration file |
159	| `docs` | `document` | Documentation file |
160	| `infra` | `service` | For Dockerfiles, docker-compose, K8s manifests |
161	| `infra` | `pipeline` | For CI/CD configs (.github/workflows, .gitlab-ci, Jenkinsfile) |
162	| `infra` | `resource` | For Terraform, CloudFormation, Vagrant |
163	| `data` | `table` | For SQL files defining tables |
164	| `data` | `schema` | For GraphQL, Protobuf, Prisma schema definitions |
165	| `data` | `endpoint` | For API schema files (OpenAPI, Swagger) |
166	| `script` | `file` | Shell scripts (treat like code) |
167	| `markup` | `file` | HTML/CSS files (treat like code) |
168

486	
487	`<batchIndex>` is the **ORIGINAL integer batch index** from the input `batches.json`. Even if your dispatch prompt fused multiple batches into one call (e.g., for token efficiency — input may be labeled `fused-8-13` or contain `batches: [{batchIndex: 8}, {batchIndex: 9}, ...]`), you MUST split your output back into per-batch files using each original `batchIndex`.

The downstream merge script (`merge-batch-graphs.py`) requires the regex `batch-(\d+)(?:-part-(\d+))?\.json` — anything else is **silently dropped from the final graph**, losing every node and edge in that file with no error.
490	
491	**Example.** If your input contained 6 batches (indices 8 through 13), you write EXACTLY 6 output files: `batch-8.json`, `batch-9.json`, `batch-10.json`, `batch-11.json`, `batch-12.json`, `batch-13.json`. ## 8 核心文件深度分析报告

---

### 1. `/parser/core_parser.cpp` - 主入口点

**类/函数/算法：**
- `show_copyright()` - 打印版权信息
- `show_compat_android_version()` - 打印 SDK 兼容性表格（21-37）
- `show_parser_usage()` - 打印命令行帮助
- `QuitCommand` 类 - 内置退出命令（继承 Command）
- `command_preload(int argc, char* const argv[])` - 核心预处理函数，解析 --core/-c, --pid/-p, --tomb/-t, --sdk, --sysroot, --va_bits, --page_size, --http, --mcp 等选项
- `main(int argc, char* const argv[])` - 主入口，设置信号处理、初始化 CommandManager、检测 --mcp 模式、启动 UI 线程或 MCP 服务器

**关键设计决策：**
- `--mcp` 模式在预处理阶段提前检测，stdout 重定向到 /dev/null 避免干扰 JSON-RPC 通信
- `command_preload` 返回 -1 表示不加载 corefile（如 --help、--http 模式）
- 支持三种加载模式：corefile 文件、进程 PID 远程 attach、tombstone 文件转换

**领域知识：**
- core-parser 支持 coredump 分析（`-c`）、进程 attach（`-p`，Linux only）、tombstone 转换（`-t`）
- VMA 过滤器标志：FILTER_SPECIAL_VMA（0x19 默认）、FILTER_SANITIZER_SHADOW_VMA、FILTER_NON_READ_VMA
- MCP（Model Context Protocol）模式用于 AI 助手集成，通过 stdio 通信

---

### 2. `/parser/command/command_manager.cpp` - 命令管理器

**类/函数/算法：**
- `CommandManager` 类 - 单例模式管理所有命令
- `VersionCommand` 类 - 返回版本信息（支持 `--git` 参数显示 git commit）
- `CommandManager::Init()` - 静态初始化，注册 50+ 内置命令（core 类、android 类、llvm 类、other 类）
- `CommandManager::Execute(const char* cmd, int argc, char* const argv[])` - 命令执行入口，支持管道（`|`）和重定向（`>`）
- `CommandManager::FindCommand(const char* cmd)` - 通过命令名或快捷键查找命令
- `CommandManager::ForeachCommand()` / `foreachInlineCommand()` / `foreachExtendCommand()` - 遍历命令
- `PushInlineCommand(Command*)` / `PushExtendCommand(Command*)` / `PopExtendCommand(Command*)` - 命令注册管理
- 插件系统：`plugin->GetCurrent()` 获取当前插件，`HookCommand` 挂载命令

**关键设计决策：**
- 内置命令通过 `PushInlineCommand` 注册，插件命令通过 `PushExtendCommand` 注册（可覆盖）
- 管道处理：`shell` 命令回调机制实现 `command | shell_cmd`
- 重定向：临时关闭高亮模式 (`Logger::SetHighLight`) 写入文件

**领域知识：**
- 命令分为 inline（内置）和 extend（插件扩展）两类
- 插件系统允许动态注册/注销命令，`FakeCommand` 处理 fake core 模式

### 3. `/parser/command/android/cmd_class.cpp` - class 命令实现

**类/函数/算法：**
- `ClassCommand::prepare(int argc, char* const argv[])` - 参数解析，支持 `-m`(method)、`-s`(static)、`-i`(impl)、`-f`(field)、`-x`(hex)，以及 `--app/--zygote/--image/--fake` 过滤
- `ClassCommand::main(int argc, char* const argv[])` - 主逻辑：单个对象直接打印；类名搜索则 `Android::ForeachObjects` 遍历堆
- `ClassCommand::PrintClass()` - 遍历回调，打印类名（descriptor 格式）
- `ClassCommand::PrintPrettyClassContent()` - 打印完整类信息：继承关系、实现接口、静态字段、实例字段（按 superclass 链遍历）、方法
- `PrintField(format, current, clazz, field, print_options)` - 字段打印（复用 PrintCommand）

**关键设计决策：**
- 实例字段按 `super -> current` 链遍历（do-while），正确继承顺序
- 静态字段通过 `Android::ForeachStaticField` 遍历
- 方法通过 `Android::ForeachArtMethods` 遍历
- `try-catch(InvalidAddressException)` 保护堆遍历

**领域知识：**
- 类名使用 ART descriptor 格式：`Ljava/lang/String;`
- `shadow$_klass_` / `shadow$_monitor_` 是 Kotlin 协程引入的隐藏字段
- `--check` 模式检测损坏对象（通过 JavaVerify）

### 4. `/parser/command/android/cmd_space.cpp` - space 命令实现

**类/函数/算法：**
- `SpaceCommand::prepare()` - 参数解析：`--check`、`--full-check`、 `--app/--zygote/--image/--fake`
- `SpaceCommand::main()` - 两种模式：
  - **check 模式**：调用 `JavaVerify` 验证对象，`verify.verify(object)` + `verify.verifyMethods()`
  - **list 模式**：遍历 `heap.GetContinuousSpaces()` 和 `heap.GetDiscontinuousSpaces()`，打印每种 space 的类型、地址范围、指针、名称

**关键设计决策：**
- check 模式使用 `JavaVerify::CHECK_FULL_BAD_OBJECT | CHECK_FULL_CONFLICT_METHOD | CHECK_FULL_REUSE_DEX_PC_PTR | CHECK_FULL_U_EXTENDS_RECORD` 标志
- 大对象空间（LargeObjectSpace）单独处理，有 `Begin()/End()` 地址范围
- 遍历标志默认全开：`EACH_APP_OBJECTS | EACH_ZYGOTE_OBJECTS | EACH_IMAGE_OBJECTS | EACH_FAKE_OBJECTS`

**领域知识：**
- Space 类型：kSpaceTypeImageSpace(0)、kSpaceTypeZygoteSpace(1)、kSpaceTypeRegionSpace(5)、kSpaceTypeMallocSpace(6)、kSpaceTypeLargeObjectSpace(7)
- ContinuousSpaces：ImageSpace、ZygoteSpace、RegionSpace、MallocSpace
- DiscontinuousSpaces：LargeObjectSpace、HeapInlineAllocatorSpace

### 5. `/android/android.cpp` - Android 版本检测与运行时镜像

**类/函数/算法：**
- `Android::Init()` / `Android::init()` - 单例初始化，从 system property 读取 ro.build.version.sdk/trunk/release/id 等
- `Android::Sdk2Trunk(int sdk)` - SDK 版本到 Trunk 版本映射（kTrunkData 数组）
- `Android::preLoad()` - 初始化所有 ART 镜像类型（Object、Class、String、Array、DexCache 等）
- `Android::preLoadLater()` - 动态库路径选择：`realLibart` 根据 SDK >= Q / > P / else 选择 LIBART64/LIBART32 或 LV29/LV28 变体
- `Android::RegisterSdkListener(int minisdk, fn)` / `RegisterOatListener(int minioat, fn)` - 版本监听器模式
- `Android::ForeachInstanceField/StaticField()` - **SDK 版本适配核心**：SDK >= W 使用统一 fields 数组（`GetFields()`），SDK < W 使用分离存储（`GetIFields()`/`GetSFields()`）
- `Android::ForeachArtMethods()` - **SDK >= N** 使用统一 methods 数组，SDK < N 分离 direct/virtual
- `Android::ForeachObjects(fn, flag, check)` - 堆遍历主函数，按 space 类型过滤（Image/Zygote/App/Fake）
- `Android::SysRoot(path)` - 符号路径解析，将本地文件映射到 coredump 内存（处理 DEX、VDEX、ZIP）
- `Android::Prepare()` - 运行时预热，触发 heap space 加载

**关键设计决策：**
- **版本适配模式（强制）**：所有字段/方法遍历必须检查 SDK 版本
- **监听器模式**：SDK/OAT 版本变化时自动执行回调，刷新偏移量表
- **SysRoot 双路径**：`dir:dir` 格式支持多目录搜索，`!` 分割主从文件（multidex）
- **QuickCache 优化**：`DEFINE_QUICK_CACHE` 避免重复地址解析

**领域知识：**
- Trunk 版本：M=13, N=14, O=15, P=16, Q=17, R=18, S=19, T=20, U=21, V=22, W=23, X=24
- 每个 ART 对象都是 8 字节对齐（kObjectAlignment）
- HeapReference 始终 32 位压缩引用

---

### 6. `/android/art/runtime/mirror/object.h` - ART 对象模型头文件

**类/结构体：**
- `Object_OffsetTable` - 对象内存布局偏移量表（klass_、monitor_）
- `Object_SizeTable` - 对象大小表（THIS = 8）
- `Object` 类 - 继承自 `api::MemoryRef`，所有 ART 对象的基类

**关键方法：**
- `GetClass()` - 获取 Class 对象（自动解压缩 32 位引用）
- `IsClass()` / `IsString()` / `IsArrayInstance()` / `IsReferenceInstance()` - 类型判断
- `IsValid()` / `IsNonLargeValid()` - 对象有效性验证
- `SizeOf()` - 对象大小
- `GetLockWord()` / `GetLockOwnerThreadId()` - 锁信息

**关键设计决策：**
- **HeapReference 压缩机制**：所有对象引用都是 32 位，即使在 64 位平台
- `DEFINE_QUICK_CACHE` 宏实现 `klass` 字段的快速缓存
- `klass()` 直接读取内存（不解压缩），`GetClass()` 通过 MemoryRef 自动解压缩

**领域知识：**
- Object 对象头（8 字节）：`+0x00: klass_`（32位压缩引用）、`+0x04: monitor_`
- 所有对象 8 字节对齐
- String 对象（SDK 26+）：`count_` 低1位=压缩标志（Latin-1/UTF-16），高31位=长度

---

### 7. `/android/art/runtime/runtime.cpp` - Runtime 实现

**类/函数/算法：**
- `Runtime::Init()` - 注册 SDK 监听器（Init23 到 Init37，共 12 个版本）
- `Runtime::Init23()...Init37()` - **版本偏移量表初始化**：每个版本 64-bit 和 32-bit 不同的偏移量（callee_save_methods、resolution_method、imt_conflict/unimplemented_method、heap、monitor_pool、thread_list、class_linker、java_vm、jit）
- `Runtime::Current()` - **Runtime 单例获取**：通过 `Android::DlSym(ART_RUNTIME_INSTANCE)` 获取实例指针，缓存到 `runtime_instance_ori_cache`
- `Runtime::AnalysisCalleeSaveMethods()` - 通过 ImageHeader magic 匹配 boot.art 的 callee_saves 方法
- `Runtime::AnalysisRuntime()` - 在 LoadBlock 中搜索匹配 callee_methods 的 runtime 实例
- `Runtime::AnalysisInstance()` - 分析实例入口（调用 AnalysisCalleeSaveMethods + AnalysisRuntime）
- `GetHeap()` / `GetMonitorPool()` / `GetThreadList()` / `GetClassLinker()` / `GetJavaVM()` / `GetJit()` - 子系统访问器（带缓存）
- `GetResolutionMethod()` / `GetImtConflictMethod()` / `GetImtUnimplementedMethod()` - ART 特殊方法获取
- `GetCalleeSaveMethod(type)` - 获取 CalleeSaveType 对应的 ArtMethod

**关键设计决策：**
- **双层缓存机制**：每个子系统（heap、thread_list 等）有独立 MemoryRef 缓存，首次访问时懒加载
- **ART_RUNTIME_PARSER 模式**：验证 runtime 实例的 callee_save_methods 与 image 匹配，不匹配则 `AnalysisRuntime` 重新搜索
- **MAIN_PROP_PARSER 模式**（SDK >= V）：扫描 heap 指针附近 finalizer_timeout_ms_ 字段，精确定位堆偏移
- **kNumCalleeMethodsCount 变化**：SDK 26（O）之前为 3，SDK 26+ 为 4，SDK 28（P）+ 为 6

**领域知识：**
- Runtime 是 ART 核心单例，包含堆、线程列表、类链接器、JIT 等子系统
- CalleeSaveMethod：保存现场的方法，用于栈回溯
- IMT（Interface Method Table）：接口方法的冲突/未实现处理

### 8. `/core/api/core.cpp` - ELF Core 解析

**类/函数/算法：**
- `CoreApi::Init()` - 初始化 Elf、LinkMap
- `CoreApi::Load(corefile, remote, callback)` - **主加载入口**：根据 machine 类型（EM_AARCH64/EM_RISCV/EM_X86_64/EM_ARM/EM_386）创建对应的 Core 实例
- `CoreApi::NewLoadBlock(vaddr, size, flags)` - 分配新的 LoadBlock（fake vaddr 分配算法）
- `CoreApi::addLoadBlock() / removeAllLoadBlock()` - LoadBlock 管理
- `CoreApi::GetReal(vaddr, opt)` / `GetVirtual(raddr)` - 虚拟地址/物理地址转换
- `CoreApi::IsVirtualValid(vaddr)` - 虚拟地址有效性检查
- `CoreApi::FindAuxv(type)` - 查找 AT_PHDR/AT_ENTRY 等辅助向量
- `CoreApi::FindThread(tid)` / `ForeachThread()` - 线程查找/遍历
- `CoreApi::FindFile(vaddr)` / `ForeachFile()` - 文件查找/遍历
- `CoreApi::FindLinkMap(path)` - 符号链接映射查找（支持 `!` 分割的 sub-file）
- `CoreApi::DlSym(symbol)` - 动态符号解析（在所有 LinkMap 中搜索）
- `CoreApi::SysRoot(path)` - 符号路径重映射
- `CoreApi::Read(vaddr, size, buf)` / `Write(vaddr, buf, size)` - 内存读写
- `CoreApi::ForeachLoadBlock(callback, check, quick)` - LoadBlock 遍历

**关键设计决策：**
- **Platform-specific Core**：通过 EM_* machine type 选择 arm64/x86_64/riscv64/arm/x86 实现
- **Fake Block 分配算法**：按需分配 fake vaddr，支持重叠检测和连续分配
- **Quick LoadBlock**：根据 flags 决定是否加入 mQuickLoad（快速查找路径）
- **LinkMap 懒加载**：ForeachLinkMap 时首次调用 loadLinkMap()

**领域知识：**
- ELF Core 文件类型：ET_CORE (4)
- ELF Page Size：4KB (0x1000)
- VMA 过滤器标志：FLAG_R/FLAG_W/FLAG_X 等
- LoadBlock：映射文件段（PHDR），支持 vaddr虚拟地址 到 raddr物理地址 的转换
- Block 类型：mMap（内存映射）、mFile（文件映射）、mFake（fake 分配）

## 设计模式总结

1. **单例模式**：`CommandManager`、`Android`、`CoreApi`、`Runtime` 均使用单例
2. **版本适配模式**：SDK 版本检测 + 条件分支（SDK 24/26/28/36 分界线）
3. **缓存模式**：QuickCache 宏 + 子系统懒加载缓存
4. **监听器模式**：SdkListener/OatListener 版本变化回调
5. **策略模式**：不同 machine type 选择不同 Core 实现
